title: Reverse Proxies, Forwarded Fields, Framing, and Request Smuggling Defense · Retrieval Circuit
summary: A delayed operations handoff reconstructs reverse proxies, forwarded fields, framing, and request smuggling defense from bounded code and request evidence, challenges one misconception, and revises the proxy hop, framing, and parser-consistency contract. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for proxy hop, framing, and parser-consistency contract after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defe…
objectives: Strip and regenerate hop-by-hop fields per connection, control Host and authority, handle Connection-nominated fields, and document request and response rewriting.
Require trusted proxies to overwrite client-controlled Forwarded and X-Forwarded values and validate the observed hop count against every reachable topology.
Reject conflicting Content-Length, transfer-coding ambiguity, invalid field syntax, premature EOF, excess body, and front-end or origin disagreement.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Node and Express server Proxy Hop By Hop Fields · changed case · Review Proxy Hop By Hop Fields
steps.instruction:
review case — A review team handles case 2564 in a signed fulfillment webhook gateway under replay pressure. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to reject untrusted topology, ambiguous framing, and insecure parser policy; retain compatibility with one older generated client; then change the tenant and prove denial before repository access. Browser code models pure decisions only. Node, Express, listener, TLS, PostgreSQL, proxy, worker, load, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Strip and regenerate hop-by-hop fields per connection, control Host and authority, handle Connection-nominated fields, and document request and response rewriting.

Which action demonstrates Proxy Hop By Hop Fields without dropping earlier contracts?

Evidence target: Node and Express server Proxy Hop By Hop Fields · changed case · Review Proxy Hop By Hop Fields.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for strip and regenerate hop-by-hop fields per connection, control host and authority, handle connection-nominated fields, and document request and response rewriting. For Node and Express server Proxy Hop By Hop Fields · changed case · Review Proxy Hop By Hop Fields, keep Proxy Hop By Hop Fields connected to executable HTTP client decision evidence.

steps.title: Node and Express server Insecure Parser Smuggling · changed case · Review Insecure Parser Smuggling
steps.instruction:
review case — A review team handles case 9945 in a signed fulfillment webhook gateway under replay pressure. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to reject untrusted topology, ambiguous framing, and insecure parser policy; retain compatibility with one older generated client; then reuse an idempotency key with different input and reject the fingerprint mismatch. Browser code models pure decisions only. Node, Express, listener, TLS, PostgreSQL, proxy, worker, load, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Keep insecure parsing disabled, align parser and normalization policies across hops, test differential cases, and close connections on ambiguous messages.
